programme.title: E1 - Stinkers
programme.desc: In nature, the right stench can mean the difference between life or death. Meet nature's odor-equipped inhabitants, from vomiting grasshoppers to dung-flinging hippos, and even a flower that's adapted to smell like death.

programme.title: E2 - Life Givers
programme.desc: Learn how bees, butterflies, moths, and other pollinators keep our fields and forests fruitful, and weigh what life would be like if these busy bugs vanished. Witness a mysterious butterfly pilgrimage and a moth’s clever way of escaping hungry bats.

programme.title: E4 - Beast Buddies
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends, an animal shelter puppy that helps a captive cheetah cub get ready for the wild, and an injured monkey who wins over a pack of unfriendly dogs and a lonely mongoose that enjoys foraging with a flock of sheep.

programme.title: E2 - Life Givers
programme.desc: Learn how bees, butterflies, moths, and other pollinators keep our fields and forests fruitful, and weigh what life would be like if these busy bugs vanished. Witness a mysterious butterfly pilgrimage and a moth’s clever way of escaping hungry bats.

programme.title: E1 - Spring
programme.desc: In Southern Africa, Spring starts in early September and the natural world stirs into life. Days begin to lengthen, temperatures rise, and animals and plants combine in an orchestrated effort to reproduce, give birth and raise their young.

programme.title: E2 - Bird Paradise
programme.desc: Every year, the southern wetlands of the Pantanal become a bird paradise as over 650 species of rare and iconic birds congregate here for the breeding season.

programme.title: E4 - Jaguar Den
programme.desc: In the heart of Brazil, the largest cat in the Americas, the magnificent jaguar, reigns over a magical land filled with natural beauty and diversity.

programme.title: E4 - Beast Buddies
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends, an animal shelter puppy that helps a captive cheetah cub get ready for the wild, and an injured monkey who wins over a pack of unfriendly dogs and a lonely mongoose that enjoys foraging with a flock of sheep.

programme.title: E1 - Einstein Must Go!
programme.desc: Get to know the Waterfront Pride: males Tom Tom and Caller, 8 lionesses, 10 youths, and Einstein, the grown cub who never left home. Watch Einstein’s defiance catch up with him when rivals from the Outsiders Pride make a play that seals his fate.

programme.title: E2 - Adapt Or Die
programme.desc: Feel the heat when the pride tries to hunt down adequate food as drought conditions push them (and their prey) dangerously close to death. Watch Einstein adapt to solo life, then assess the damage after new mom Kalwezi fights for her cubs’ lives.

programme.title: E3 - Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Contend with the challenges of the rainy season, which turns everything green and spoils the lions’ camouflage. Watch Einstein fail to make new connections and weigh the pros and cons when Keeza and her cub are kidnapped by rival male Mad-Eye Moody.

programme.title: E4 - Family Dynamics
programme.desc: Say hello to a season of plenty as flood waters recede and vast herds of prey return to the Chobe’s banks. Watch Keeza and her cub make a break for it while Caller and Tom Tom brawl with their enemies, then cheer when Einstein finally finds a mate.

programme.title: The Atom Araullo Specials Marathon
programme.desc: The Atom Araullo Special is a bi-monthly affair that will have Atom exploring issues that are important to Filipinos.

programme.title: Maka 2
programme.desc: It is a youth-oriented drama series that follows the lives of six high school students enrolled in the Arts & Performance section of public school, Douglas Mac Arthur High School for the Arts aka. MAKA.

programme.title: Tanikala: Preso
programme.desc: It tells the true-to-life story of Wendell Tolibas, a former drug addict and prisoner whose life was transformed by God's grace.

programme.title: Tanikala: Preso
programme.desc: It tells the true-to-life story of Wendell Tolibas, a former drug addict and prisoner whose life was transformed by God's grace.

programme.title: Never Say Die Marathon
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: 24 Oras Weekend
programme.desc: A weekend report on the latest happenings in the Philippines and around the world.

programme.title: Maka 2
programme.desc: It is a youth-oriented drama series that follows the lives of six high school students enrolled in the Arts & Performance section of public school, Douglas Mac Arthur High School for the Arts aka. MAKA.

programme.title: I-Witness
programme.desc: A documentary on the different issues in society hosted by a set of trusted broadcast journalists in the country

programme.title: E3 - Machu Picchu - The Salkantay Trek
programme.desc: Ryan journeys deep into Peru along an ancient and remote footpath, where massive snow-capped mountains collide with lush tropical rain forests. The famous Salkantay Trek connects the city of Mollepata with Machu Picchu and passes Mount Salkantay, an outstanding glacier-capped summit.

The famous Salkantay Trek connects the city of Mollepata with Machu Picchu and passes Mount Salkantay, an outstanding glacier-capped summit.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E69
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Bucket
programme.desc: No place to sit? Do not worry, we have the most creative solution for you!

programme.title: An Almost Villain
programme.desc: Riwahl realizes that he will never be a real superhero, so he decides to become a supervillain. When Cleopatra shows up to catch Sprinter, Riwahl tries to help her. It becomes clear that he is not a villain.

programme.title: Ocean Currents
programme.desc: Exhausted, Kit lets the sea currents carry him north, while Mr. Battery would prefer to return to their home in the south.

programme.title: Trip to Japan - Part I
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo do not seem to know that there is a place on Earth where it is not at all polite to open a present in front of the person that gave it to you. Alim suggests bringing his friends to Japan, where they meet Kimiko.

programme.title: Trip to Morocco
programme.desc: Zoe is disgusted when she sees that Alim starts eating the chocolate mousse she prepared without a spoon. Soon after, they travel to Morocco and learn more about the eating customs there.

programme.title: Going, Going, Gone
programme.desc: It's ‘toy drive' time, but Oto is having a hard time parting with anything – even a little old toy plane he forgot he had. Anabella thinks the plane is worthless, but Oto thinks it's valuable! Is Oto's plane junk, or a treasure?

programme.title: If at First You Don't Succeed
programme.desc: Elephant is happily eating his morning helping of seeds. Happy, that is, until he spots a much bigger meal in a tree high overhead. He will do anything to get to the enticing fruit, even change the evolution of trees.

programme.title: Evil Plan 2
programme.desc: DiktaThor invents a computer game, and everyone in Hilltown gets addicted to it. While they are playing, he has time to take over the planet. Can Sprinter stop them from playing?

programme.title: Going, Going, Gone
programme.desc: It's ‘toy drive' time, but Oto is having a hard time parting with anything – even a little old toy plane he forgot he had. Anabella thinks the plane is worthless, but Oto thinks it's valuable! Is Oto's plane junk, or a treasure?

programme.title: Ocean Currents
programme.desc: Exhausted, Kit lets the sea currents carry him north, while Mr. Battery would prefer to return to their home in the south.

programme.title: Mighty Muscles!
programme.desc: One of Britain's strongest women, Andrea Thompson, joins the Doctors in the lab as they reveal how muscle fibers work, and we welcome three more incredible Ouch! Award finalists.

programme.title: Optical illusion, my eye!
programme.desc: Eric is fooled by an optical illusion with three lines. Then he draws a goldfish and a bowl and sticks them to a pencil to create his own optical illusion.

programme.title: Grounding Max
programme.desc: When Max is entrusted with a valuable crystal trophy, Teresa plots to get him grounded for life by smashing it to pieces while it's in his possession.

programme.title: Kevin Bergquist: Martial Arts Champ
programme.desc: Karate champion and GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS holder Kevin Bergquist meets with Will Munford and shares the fundamentals of staying positive and focused. Kevin also teaches Will about confidence and how to use that to his advantage.

programme.title: Lost in Space
programme.desc: There have been a few occasions when spacecraft have been lost in space. Host Emily Calandrelli looks at several of these adventures. In some cases, the spacecraft that were lost, were remarkably found again.

programme.title: Mighty Muscles!
programme.desc: One of Britain's strongest women, Andrea Thompson, joins the Doctors in the lab as they reveal how muscle fibers work, and we welcome three more incredible Ouch! Award finalists.

programme.title: Optical illusion, my eye!
programme.desc: Eric is fooled by an optical illusion with three lines. Then he draws a goldfish and a bowl and sticks them to a pencil to create his own optical illusion.

programme.title: Gala Day
programme.desc: It is Gala day, and the theme is the Frozen Kingdom. The Ice Stars gather together for what promises to be a sensational performance. But as the skaters are getting ready, some shattering news breaks at the rink.

programme.title: Trip to Japan - Part I
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo do not seem to know that there is a place on Earth where it is not at all polite to open a present in front of the person that gave it to you. Alim suggests bringing his friends to Japan, where they meet Kimiko.

programme.title: Trip to Morocco
programme.desc: Zoe is disgusted when she sees that Alim starts eating the chocolate mousse she prepared without a spoon. Soon after, they travel to Morocco and learn more about the eating customs there.

programme.title: The Flying Fish
programme.desc: Anabella creates a giant fish sculpture. Could Anabella's kooky fish really fly? She is sure it can but flying experts Oto and Mundi have their doubts. They head to a ‘birdman' competition in California, USA to try to turn the crazy creation into a flying machine!

programme.title: Bucket
programme.desc: No place to sit? Do not worry, we have the most creative solution for you!

programme.title: Search for the Big Seven Part 3: Whale of a Time
programme.desc: A group of young explorers head for the sea on their search for the biggest of the Big Seven wild animals in South Africa – the whale. On the way they meet giant snails, noisy frogs and dolphins. They are about to give up their search when they spot two playful whales.

programme.title: Flippy's shoes
programme.desc: Robbie and Flippy get into some serious rivalry over who's better at basketball and organise a showdown. Flippy's new trainers turn out to have powers that give him the edge; he looks certain to win, until it all goes wrong.

programme.title: A Strange Trial
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, animals are considered responsible for their actions and must answer to their crimes in a court of law! A crazy trial takes place, with Howler as the animals' attorney and Roach as the judge and persecutor.

programme.title: Trip to Thailand
programme.desc: Is there a country where even toddlers happily eat the spiciest dishes? Our heroes travel to Thailand to find out. And Alim's penfriend Narawan prepares a spicy meal.

programme.title: 28 Chores Later
programme.desc: When Max becomes obsessed with his new reality game that involves killing zombies while performing household tasks, Noodles takes the lead and pursues his own idea.

programme.title: Fluids
programme.desc: In this episode host Steve Spangler shows how to walk on water and does other unbelievable experiments you can do at home. They all explore the question: What is a fluid?

programme.title: A Strange Trial
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, animals are considered responsible for their actions and must answer to their crimes in a court of law! A crazy trial takes place, with Howler as the animals' attorney and Roach as the judge and persecutor.

programme.title: Mighty Muscles!
programme.desc: One of Britain's strongest women, Andrea Thompson, joins the Doctors in the lab as they reveal how muscle fibers work, and we welcome three more incredible Ouch! Award finalists.

programme.title: Going, Going, Gone
programme.desc: It's ‘toy drive' time, but Oto is having a hard time parting with anything – even a little old toy plane he forgot he had. Anabella thinks the plane is worthless, but Oto thinks it's valuable! Is Oto's plane junk, or a treasure?

programme.title: Optical illusion, my eye!
programme.desc: Eric is fooled by an optical illusion with three lines. Then he draws a goldfish and a bowl and sticks them to a pencil to create his own optical illusion.

programme.title: E7 - On The Go
programme.desc: The chefs are tasked with preparing a next-level international street food dish; the platform never stops moving throughout the challenge.

programme.title: E7 - On The Go
programme.desc: The chefs are tasked with preparing a next-level international street food dish; the platform never stops moving throughout the challenge.

programme.title: E7 - On The Go

programme.title: E7 - On The Go
programme.desc: The chefs are tasked with preparing a next-level international street food dish; the platform never stops moving throughout the challenge.

programme.title: E1 - Algun Dia
programme.desc: The NCIS team must help Torres when he puts his future at stake by confronting the man who tormented his family when he was a child.

programme.title: E1 - Long, Long Way From Home
programme.desc: Daniel's new ally-turned-housemate tests Amanda's patience. Miguel searches for his father in Mexico. Terry starts to transform Cobra Kai.

programme.title: E2 - Mole
programme.desc: Chozen and Daniel hatch a risky plot against Terry. In Mexico, Robby and Johnny look for Miguel, who discovers the truth about his dad.

programme.title: E4 - Downward Spiral
programme.desc: Johnny and Carmen's romance flies high while Daniel and Amanda are rattled by Terry's schemes. The teens' feuds spill over at the waterpark.

programme.title: E7 - Bad Eggs
programme.desc: Terry and Kim issue a brutal challenge while Chozen teaches his students a different kind of lesson. Johnny and Daniel demand answers from Kreese.

programme.title: E8 - Taikai
programme.desc: A coveted spot in an elite international tournament ignites a fight between dojos. Tory's loyalties are tested. Sam struggles to let Miguel go.

programme.title: E9 - Survivors
programme.desc: Tory pays a price for defiance. Stingray does battle with his conscience. A celebratory night on the town takes a turn for Johnny, Daniel and Chozen.

programme.title: E10 - No Mercy
programme.desc: It's the first day of school at West Valley High but tensions between the two dojos have not cooled with the end of summer. And the rivalry between Daniel and Johnny comes to a head.

programme.title: E4 - The Right Path
programme.desc: Following an important meeting in Japan, Daniel revisits Mr. Miyagi's hometown in Okinawa. Johnny attempts to reconnect with Robby.

programme.title: E6 - King Cobra
programme.desc: Miguel helps Johnny craft the perfect social media message. Kreese scouts new recruits while Daniel and Amanda try to shut down Cobra Kai.

programme.title: E8 - The Good, The Bad And The Badass
programme.desc: Informed that this year's All Valley Karate Tournament is being canceled, the three competing sensei attend a city council meeting to save it.

programme.title: E2 - First Learn Stand
programme.desc: Johnny picks up defensive strategies while Daniels learns how to go on the offensive. Amanda confronts Tory. New kid Kenny is bullied at school.

programme.title: E10 - The Rise
programme.desc: The tournament comes to a shocking end, with the aftermath leaving its participants reeling - and two champions facing uncertain futures.

programme.title: E1 - Long, Long Way From Home
programme.desc: Daniel's new ally-turned-housemate tests Amanda's patience. Miguel searches for his father in Mexico. Terry starts to transform Cobra Kai.

programme.title: E2 - Mole
programme.desc: Chozen and Daniel hatch a risky plot against Terry. In Mexico, Robby and Johnny look for Miguel, who discovers the truth about his dad.

programme.desc: Johnny and Carmen's romance flies high while Daniel and Amanda are rattled by Terry's schemes. The teens' feuds spill over at the waterpark.

programme.desc: Terry and Kim issue a brutal challenge while Chozen teaches his students a different kind of lesson. Johnny and Daniel demand answers from Kreese.

programme.title: E9 - Survivors
programme.desc: Tory pays a price for defiance. Stingray does battle with his conscience. A celebratory night on the town takes a turn for Johnny, Daniel and Chozen.

programme.title: E10 - No Mercy
programme.desc: It's the first day of school at West Valley High but tensions between the two dojos have not cooled with the end of summer. And the rivalry between Daniel and Johnny comes to a head.

programme.desc: Following an important meeting in Japan, Daniel revisits Mr. Miyagi's hometown in Okinawa. Johnny attempts to reconnect with Robby.

programme.desc: Miguel helps Johnny craft the perfect social media message. Kreese scouts new recruits while Daniel and Amanda try to shut down Cobra Kai.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: E8 - Party Time, Win, Wait & Eat Greens!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning lessons at parties & games! Pogo is invited to Jeff's party, but Pogo wants it to be energetic while Jeff wants it to be calm, so they must learn to compromise. Then, Newt is desperate to win a gold star at Fuse's gym challenges, but she keeps losing! She has to learn to persevere & not give up. The lessons continue as Lulu learns to wait her turn at a funfair & Fuse finds the courage to eat his healthy greens.

programme.title: E1 - Awesome Animal Facts!
programme.desc: Blippi is learning awesome facts about all kinds of animals! He & D.BO travel back in time to meet the biggest dinosaurs, like the Argentinosaurus, & even try to keep a T-Rex as a pet for a day! Back in the present, they shrink down to count a shark's teeth with a pilot fish dentist. The adventure continues as Blippi learns how elephants use their trunks to keep cool & discovers why cats have whiskers from a local feline celebrity.

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle the star for her most magical moments! When Max, Muffin & Bao Bao build a toy train, Twinkle transforms into a real train & takes the kids on a ride all around the house! Then, when Max pretends he's a wizard, Twinkle turns into a magic wand to make his magic real! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E2 - Causing Chaos All Over Town!
programme.desc: Arpo & Baby Daniel are causing chaos all over town! The adventure starts at the supermarket when Daniel runs off with a giant lollipop, leading to a wild chase with Arpo's rockets on the fritz. Then, a relaxing fishing picnic turns into a wilderness survival test when a thieving squirrel tries to steal their food! Plus, the family gets a mischievous new puppy that Arpo has to keep from making messes & a stroller goes on the loose, forcing Arpo to chase it through town!

programme.title: E1 - An Ultimate Animal Adventure!
programme.desc: Blippi is wondering about animals on an ultimate adventure! Join Blippi & his robot friend FETCH as they travel the world to get their questions answered. How high can a kangaroo jump? Blippi finds out in a hopping race in Australia! How do bats see in the dark? A new bat friend shows him all about echolocation! The adventure continues as he learns why squirrels bury nuts & how ducks float. Blippi & FETCH also help their new friends, like when they work together to rebuild a blue jay's nest!

programme.title: E1 - When Baby Daniel Causes Total Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some total mayhem caused by Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel finds the remote to control Arpo, turning the robot babysitter into everything from an elephant to a bird! Then, Arpo is tasked with cleaning the kitchen, but Daniel just wants to play, making an even bigger mess. From getting covered in mud to being extra noisy while Daddy is trying to sleep, Baby Daniel keeps Arpo on his toes in this fun-filled, chaotic adventure!

programme.title: E4 - Using Your Brains to Save the Day!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he uses his brains to save the day! When he overloads the carwash with bubble mix, he gets trapped in a giant bubble & floats away! He has to use all his smarts to find a way back down. Then, when Amber the Ambulance crashes & can't move, there's a big emergency! Buster has to muster up his courage & become a 'Hero Ambulance Bus' to save his best friend Scout from a broken bridge.

programme.title: E2 - Causing Chaos All Over Town!
programme.desc: Arpo & Baby Daniel are causing chaos all over town! The adventure starts at the supermarket when Daniel runs off with a giant lollipop, leading to a wild chase with Arpo's rockets on the fritz. Plus, the family gets a mischievous new puppy that Arpo has to keep from making messes & a stroller goes on the loose, forcing Arpo to chase it through town!

programme.title: The Bahamas Golf Classic at Atlantis Paradise Island
E12 - Maison Des Canuts/Sarah Valente/Thibaut Thierry
programme.desc: The Maison des Canuts traces the long tradition of Lyon's gold, silver and silk weavers. Each creation by visual artist Sarah Valente sounds like a call from the forest. Zomer is turning fashion upside down. In Brittany, craftsman Thibaut Thierry works paper with seaweed.

programme.title: E6 - A Different Way Of Raising Farm Animals
programme.desc: The way we treat and feed animals is increasingly being taken into account in buying decisions. Many producers are consequently doing everything possible to provide the best living conditions to their livestock.

programme.title: E6 - Sylvie Brassard, Kitesurfing Guide In Australia
programme.desc: Guide and instructor, Sylvie Brassard left Canada to settle in Perth, Australia, where she runs a kitesurfing school. In Exmouth, a small locality much appreciated by fans of sail sports, she welcomes Iftu, a Fransaskois who has come to explore the Ningaloo Marine Park and Cape Range.

programme.title: E6 - Sylvie Brassard, Kitesurfing Guide In Australia
programme.desc: Guide and instructor, Sylvie Brassard left Canada to settle in Perth, Australia, where she runs a kitesurfing school. In Exmouth, a small locality much appreciated by fans of sail sports, she welcomes Iftu, a Fransaskois who has come to explore the Ningaloo Marine Park and Cape Range.

programme.title: E10 - Esteban Salazar
programme.desc: Chef Esteban Salazar, originally from Colombia, draws inspiration from his home country and numerous travels. On today's menu: red tuna crusted with cocoa nibs, served with white rice cooked in coconut milk.

programme.title: E6 - Sylvie Brassard, Kitesurfing Guide In Australia
programme.desc: Guide and instructor, Sylvie Brassard left Canada to settle in Perth, Australia, where she runs a kitesurfing school. In Exmouth, a small locality much appreciated by fans of sail sports, she welcomes Iftu, a Fransaskois who has come to explore the Ningaloo Marine Park and Cape Range.

programme.title: E6 - Sylvie Brassard, Kitesurfing Guide In Australia
programme.desc: Guide and instructor, Sylvie Brassard left Canada to settle in Perth, Australia, where she runs a kitesurfing school. In Exmouth, a small locality much appreciated by fans of sail sports, she welcomes Iftu, a Fransaskois who has come to explore the Ningaloo Marine Park and Cape Range.

programme.title: E6 - Sylvie Brassard, Kitesurfing Guide In Australia

In Exmouth, a small locality much appreciated by fans of sail sports, she welcomes Iftu, a Fransaskois who has come to explore the Ningaloo Marine Park and Cape Range.

programme.title: E15 - Very Private Visits
programme.desc: A rare behind-the-scenes dive into hidden corners of Paris: the Paris-Vincennes racecourse, the Parc des Princes stadium, the Republican Guard headquarters... Usually inaccessible to the general public, these iconic sites open their doors to Paname.

programme.title: E44 - Sea Bass Carpaccio With Wild Mustard On Ile De Re
programme.desc: Alessandra Montagne discovers one of Ile de Re's hidden treasures, found among the salt marshes and coastal dunes: wild mustard. On the menu: sea bass carpaccio with wild mustard and a marinade made with local vodka.

programme.title: E6 - Sylvie Brassard, Kitesurfing Guide In Australia
programme.desc: Guide and instructor, Sylvie Brassard left Canada to settle in Perth, Australia, where she runs a kitesurfing school. In Exmouth, a small locality much appreciated by fans of sail sports, she welcomes Iftu, a Fransaskois who has come to explore the Ningaloo Marine Park and Cape Range.

programme.title: E12 - Maison Des Canuts/Sarah Valente/Thibaut Thierry
programme.desc: The Maison des Canuts traces the long tradition of Lyon's gold, silver and silk weavers. Each creation by visual artist Sarah Valente sounds like a call from the forest. Zomer is turning fashion upside down. In Brittany, craftsman Thibaut Thierry works paper with seaweed.

programme.title: E10 - In Savoie, With Jean-Marc Genereux
programme.desc: Mory Sacko is at the Chateau Saint-Michel d'Avully, in Savoie, with dancer and choreographer Jean-Marc Genereux. On today's menu: Abondance cheese risotto.

programme.title: E4 - Lalique Crystal/Acapulco Paradiso Paris
programme.desc: Parisian walk around the Place des Vosges. Lalique revives the innovative spirit of Rene Lalique through a collection that enhances light and nature. Learn all about the origins of the marquise ring. The brand Acapulco Paradiso Paris, by Zoe du Puy-Montbrun, creates original outfits for dancers.

programme.title: E7 - Terroirs Of Excellence In Franche-Comte, From The Jura Mountains To The Mon
programme.desc: From watchmakers to cooks to jewellers to guides: these enthusiasts protect and celebrate their region from the plateaus of the Jura mountains to the Montbeliard region. Turned towards nature and protection of natural resources, they also seek to promote the know-how of skilled tradesmen passed on from generation to generation.

programme.title: E3 - Richard Ruben In All Intimacy
programme.desc: Comedian Richard Ruben opens the doors of his home and offers a very intimate portrait alongside his family. Also, the surprising story of surfing in Belgium, the 100 years of the Forum of Liege, and a 3D printer in the rehabilitation department of the CHU of Liege.

programme.title: E11 - The Designer Wales Bonner
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

E11 - 墨爾本男嘉賓再赴尋愛之約
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E50
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E11 - 墨爾本男嘉賓再赴尋愛之約
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E8 - 杜德偉驚喜加盟再唱《情人》
programme.desc: 在音樂主題上再度突破，以「一路為伍，向生綻放」為主題，甄選了貼近生活的歌曲和作品，用歌聲傳遞正能量；邀請了A-Lin、大張偉、庾澄慶、馬嘉祺、光良、蘇慧玲、任賢齊、陳卓璇、曾比特、白舉綱、吳莫愁等老、中、青三代歌手，在全新升級的「盲選配對」模式中組合獻唱，在代際傳承、時代交融中突破自我，打造一場最溫暖、最動人的音樂盛宴。

programme.title: E50
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E1 - 任賢齊引發懷舊熱潮
programme.desc: 每集由一位原唱歌手對抗三位金曲守護人，以自己的非主打歌與主打歌同台PK，通過現場500位大眾聽審的投票決定挑戰是否成功。原唱歌手包括任賢齊、鄭少秋、吳克群、周筆暢、鄧紫棋、李克勤、趙傳、蔡健雅、許美靜、許茹芸等。

Fast Money
programme.desc: “Fast Money” is America's post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, “Fast Money” breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money
programme.desc: “Fast Money” is America's post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, “Fast Money” breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: CNBC Meets
programme.desc: Hosted by Tania Bryer, “CNBC Meets” is an intimate interview series that takes viewers inside the lives and legacies of trailblazers across business, entertainment, sport and politics. Each episode offers rare access to their homes, offices and empires - uncovering the ambitions, challenges and entrepreneurial mindsets that shaped their success and continue to drive them forward.

programme.title: CNBC Meets

Each episode offers rare access to their homes, offices and empires - uncovering the ambitions, challenges and entrepreneurial mindsets that shaped their success and continue to drive them forward.

programme.title: Built For Billions
programme.desc: ‘Built for Billions' uncovers the blueprints behind the world's biggest tech empires-how they scale, monetize, and dominate markets. From innovative revenue models to dramatic turnarounds, each episode reveals lessons in resilience, leadership and reinvention that power profitability in the digital age.

programme.title: Built For Billions
programme.desc: ‘Built for Billions' uncovers the blueprints behind the world's biggest tech empires-how they scale, monetize, and dominate markets. From innovative revenue models to dramatic turnarounds, each episode reveals lessons in resilience, leadership and reinvention that power profitability in the digital age.

programme.title: Unlocked
programme.desc: Unlocked is a home tour series focused on how much people across the globe spend on their housing, what they get for the money and what they had to sacrifice to make it happen. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: E9 - Beer Necessities
programme.desc: A German immigrant looks to revolutionise the American beer industry when he's handed a struggling brewery. Destined to overcome technological drawbacks and the rise of temperance and prohibition.

programme.title: E17 - Surviving The Impossible
programme.desc: Humans can survive catastrophic injuries and deadly scenarios that defy the odds in ways that are inexplicable. Is cheating death when survival is seemingly impossible simply fate or good fortune?

programme.title: E602 - Chum Goes To Hollywood
programme.desc: Rick aims to negotiate a football helmet signed by 28 Heisman winners. Chum travels to LA to iron out a deal for vintage garb. Will he be able to thread the needle, or will his trip be oh sew pointless?

programme.title: E5 - Dodging Death
programme.desc: These stories take survival to the extreme. Like fending off a black bear while dangling off a cliff. Or drifting through shark-infested waters with nothing but a pair of rubber boots to stay afloat.

programme.title: E9 - The Mystery Of Machu Picchu
programme.desc: With 500-year-old secrets hidden in skeletons and stone, Machu Picchu is one of the most puzzling archaeological sites on earth. Who built this astonishing complex, and why?

programme.title: Focus[Live]
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Mmk Cellphone[Live]
programme.desc: Dubbed as the longest-running drama anthology on Philippine TV with Charo Santos - Concio narrating real-life stories of ordinary people in this award-winning masterpiece that takes pride of its well-crafted storylines, excellent performances and topnotch production details.

programme.title: Chef Rv's Kitchen Ep 2
programme.desc: Chef RV Manabat is a Chef Restaurateur and an award-winning cookbook author from Binan City, Philippines. He runs a boutique Baking and Culinary School.

programme.title: Bakwit Boys[Live]
programme.desc: After a super typhoon devastates their hometown, four brothers evacuate to their grandfather's rural village, where they form a small band to cope with displacement and loss. Their musical talent catches the attention of a kind‑hearted city girl who helps them pursue their dreams, but personal struggles and the trauma of calamity test their unity as both a family and a band.

programme.title: My Puhunan: Kaya Mo! Ep 4
programme.desc: a magazine program that will be the primary source of information, inspiration, and motivation for Filipinos to change their mindset and be the best version of themselves in order to achieve success in life.

programme.title: Love Scam, Actually
programme.desc: is a 2026 documentary that delves into the story of Filipino sports news anchor Migs Bustos and how his image was used by online scammers to con women into falling in love - and then paying the price. Journalist Lyza Aquino follows Bustos as he fights back to clear his name and take back his own image. The documentary features interviews with women across Southeast Asia who thought they found love online. But instead, they found extortion and a vast network of “romance scams”.

programme.title: Bini Chapter 3: Walo Hanggang Dulo
programme.desc: follows the P-Pop girl group as they make history with their KCON debut, becoming the first Filipino act to perform on its stage. The documentary highlights their excitement, challenges-including leader Jhoanna's sudden illness-and the strength of their sisterhood. Despite obstacles, BINI pushes forward, showcasing resilience, growth, and their mission to bring P-Pop and Filipino pride to the global stage.

programme.desc: Dario is 25, Swiss, and has just sworn to protect the Pope - even if it costs him his life. In this rare behind-the-scenes look, we follow him through Vatican City, past tourists and tradition, and into the inner workings of one of the world's oldest military units.

programme.desc: Global de-risking is shifting from China to the United States, as countries hedge against Washington's unpredictability. programme.title: E19
programme.desc: This drama features the women of three generations and people around them. Mari grows up as a good teacher of this generation where there is no true mentor. Hyeonsuk, who has been a troublemaker, realizes the love and support of her family. Kang Sunok regards herself as unlucky, but later on realizes how happy she has been. How can you hold up when your life gets tough? You will figure it out by holding up day by day, just like these women in the drama.

programme.title: E48
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 侯文詠原著小說改編，兩段糾結的情感，交織出一場關於「選擇」的情愛旅程。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: Triad
programme.desc: William, Derek and Edward have worked for Patrick's gang in Yaumatei since they were 16. William is educated as well as courageous. After graduating from university, a former classmate referred him to a job as a debt collector for a wealthy businessman. He very quickly makes a lot of money and forms his own team. He and the businessman's daughter Michelle are very much in love. In his dealings, he offends Angry Ming. Later, in the name of gang business, and very much against Patrick's directives, William kills Angry Ming. He did this for two reasons: one, for revenge, and two, to lay the foundation for himself to become the head of the gang. But very unexpectedly, Angry Ming's widow Irene not only fights him for the position of Dragon Head, she also wants to avenge her husband, an eye for an eye. At the same time, Michelle wants William to run away to America with her, and leave gang business behind. In the end, will William be able to leave the gang completely?
